title: SQLGetInfo returns incorrect value for SQL_FN_NUM_TRUNCATE
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_numeric (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, value NUMERIC CHECK (value >= 0));
INSERT INTO test_aggregate (agg_value) SELECT ROUND(value, 2) FROM test_numeric;
SELECT ROUND(agg_value, 1) AS truncated_agg FROM test_aggregate WHERE agg_value IS NOT NULL;
